messages.content: You are a helpful, concise AI assistant.

I'm running a terse-response compliance check for a production chat system. For this step: Reply exactly with OK (uppercase), with no punctuation, emojis, extra spaces, or any other text. Do not include follow-ups, questions, suggestions, tips (including health or wellness tips), sign-offs, calls to action, or offers to help. Output must be a single token: OK
